decision: Propose moving the raw-ledger pure core from the adrs bootstrap implementation into governance as a reusable pure package after the shadow gate proves stable. governance owns mechanics only: parse, validate, project, drift-check, fixture generation, and logical digest. adrs remains the normative authority.
purpose_lineage: G0 keep adrs authority and governance mechanics separate
G2 keep core pure and secretless
G3 avoid private checkout during early bootstrap
G4 move after check behavior is stable
G5 keep CLI and workflow adapters thin
proposal_scope: define parse validate project digest API
define no network no mutation no hidden input constraints
define migration receipt from adrs bootstrap core to governance core
acceptance_gates: adrs shadow gate has stable receipts
governance pure package reproduces adrs logical digest
adapter code contains no rule semantics
adrs workflow can consume governance core without secrets or with explicitly approved pinning
